editor.rationale: Reviewers support publication but want clarifications on reporting completeness and residual uncertainty.

concerns: Only k=3 of 232 available trials included; heterogeneity and publication-bias diagnostics are underpowered. Justify exclusions or expand eligibility.
Pooled 0.66 diverges from Moore 2018 benchmark (HR 0.30 [0.23, 0.41]); Discussion should reconcile explicitly.
I² = 81.7% (considerable); show subgroup/strata estimates alongside pooled.
QoL / PROs not reported by any included trial; add a PRO secondary outcome where source-trial data permits.
